proposed_domain: Tibetan thangka pigment preparation (raw mineral pigments hand-ground for days to fine consistency + yak-hide glue binder; binder strength must scale with pigment density: dense gold/cinnabar requires stronger binder; lighter pigments tolerate weaker binder)

closest_prior_match.verdict: DISTINCT — pyrotechnics is emission spectra; thangka is binder-pigment ratio. Different mechanism class.
